selection.selection_note: Judged only owned repair batch 30 against full standard_source_table metadata, semantic_brief, S-57/OpenCPN structure, S-101/OpenCPN provider witnesses, and actual batch-30 Helm candidate SVG/renders on branch.

verdicts.expected: FAIRWY51 is fairway with one-way traffic in direction indicated: an outlined one-way fairway directional arrow in the gray CHGRD/reference colour family.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct FAIRWY class, one-way directional arrow, hollow outline, and gray reference colour. Visual scale/stroke are Helm style differences only; do not mark final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is now a hollow one-way fairway arrow in the gray CHGRD/reference stroke family, with no diamond placeholder or black-stroke regression.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: FAIRWY52 is fairway with two-way traffic: an outlined two-way/opposing fairway directional arrow in the gray CHGRD/reference colour family.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct FAIRWY class, two-way arrow convention, hollow outline, and gray reference colour. Visual scale/stroke are Helm style differences only; do not mark final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is now a hollow two-way fairway arrow in the gray CHGRD/reference stroke family, with opposing arrowheads and no generic marker substitution.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: FLDSTR01 is flood stream, rate at spring tides: gray current arrow with spring-rate tick geometry, not a horizontal rate bar or route arrow.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct current/flood-stream class, direction arrow, gray reference colour, and spring-rate cue. Tick placement is a stylized Helm redraw but no dangerous confusion remains.
verdicts.observed: Candidate preserves the gray flood-stream arrow and replaces the previous horizontal crossbar with slanted spring-rate tick strokes on the arrow stem.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: FRYARE51 is ferry area: ferry/route outline with dashed route continuation in the magenta ferry-area reference colour family.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct ferry-area class, dashed ferry route convention, and magenta reference colour. No final human approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate keeps the ferry-on-dashed-route geometry and now uses the magenta CHMGD/CHMGF reference colour family instead of black.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: FSHFAC02 is fishing stakes: simple gray lower rectangle/panel with one diagonal stake/line, not a brown lattice or multi-cell grid.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct fishing-stakes facility class, gray reference colour, and simplified rectangle-plus-diagonal witness. Minor proportions differ from providers but preserve the intended mark.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a gray fishing-stakes rectangle with one diagonal stake/line and no extra lattice cells or brown colour.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: FSHFAC03 is the area pattern for fishing stakes: low horizontal gray row of short stakes/posts at reference proportions.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct fishing-stakes pattern class, gray reference colour, low comb silhouette, and no buoy/beacon/hazard confusion. Keep pending final approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a low gray comb/row of short fishing stakes, compressed from the prior tall brown-post version.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: HRBFAC09 is fishing harbour: magenta fish/arc harbour-service mark matching the S-101/OpenCPN witness, with no black circle or text substitution.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct harbour facility/service class, magenta colour family, fish/arc convention, and removal of invented text/enclosure. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a magenta fish/arc fishing-harbour service mark without the prior black enclosing circle or invented F text.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.

verdicts.expected: PILPNT02 is pile or bollard: a small filled black point/circle witness, not a signpost, tapered bollard body, or diamond marker.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct mooring/pile point class and black filled point convention. Candidate is larger than the tiny OpenCPN raster witness but still reads as the S-101/OpenCPN point/circle mark; keep pending final approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a filled black circular pile/bollard point mark with the prior tapered post/body removed.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
